description_long: This is a vintage, rectangular metal toolbox with a weathered light blue finish and visible signs of rust and wear, suggesting extensive use. The front face features three drawers of varying sizes, one of which is partially open, and a larger open compartment, all framed by a sturdy metal structure. The top of the box is fitted with a single, arched, brown handle that appears to be made of metal with a worn grip, and is accompanied by a small padlock. The front also displays two distinct latching mechanisms: a brass-colored clasp on the left and a black lockable latch in the center, with a keyhole and a round button. The sides are mostly plain, but the right side features a retro-style pin-up sticker, while the left side is unadorned except for hinges and some minor hardware. The back is simple, with two hinges for the lid and no additional features, while the overall construction is robust, designed to protect and organize tools in urban or garage environments.
description: A weathered, light blue metal toolbox with a brown handle, multiple drawers, and visible latches, showing signs of heavy use and a retro sticker on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers, one open compartment, two latches, a handle on top, and a padlock.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain surface with minor hardware and the side profile of the drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a simple, flat back with two hinges and no additional features.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a retro pin-up sticker and the side profile of the handle and drawers.
attribute_handle_type: Single arched fixed handle made of metal with a worn brown grip, likely leather-wrapped for comfort; designed for carrying and not retractable.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two visible latching mechanisms: a brass-colored clasp latch on the left and a central black lockable latch with a keyhole, both made of metal.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Front face has three drawers of varying sizes (two small, one large), one large open compartment, and a main top compartment accessible via the lid; all compartments appear fixed.
attribute_external_labeling: Retro pin-up sticker on the right side panel, featuring a woman and a red object; no readable text.
